full_text:
Chen Dao (Shuzhi) 陳到 (叔至)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Dao (陳到), styledShuzhi (叔至), was born in Runan. Served Liu Bei since he held Yizhou. Held office just under Zhao Yun. Chen Dao was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Chen Dao lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
